items.br: Extrai gestores de departamento com vigencia e informacoes organizacionais. Suporta identificacao de responsaveis e governanca departamental.
items.en: Extracts department managers with effective dates and organizational information. Supports responsible person identification and departmental governance.
items.es: Extrae gestores de departamento con vigencia e información organizacional. Soporta identificación de responsables y gobernanza departamental.
